channel.title: AI Press Review
channel.itunes:author: David Perron
channel.itunes:subtitle: 40 sources. 15 minutes. What matters in AI today.
channel.itunes:summary: 40 sources. 15 minutes. What matters in AI today.
channel.description:
AI Press Review is a daily AI news briefing — published every morning at 7AM CET, Monday through Sunday. Each episode draws from 40+ weighted global sources, structured across six editorial pillars: AI News, Research & Breakthroughs, Use Cases, Tools & Practice, Weak Signals, and Education.
Sources are selected by domain authority and editorial standards. Regulatory speculation, unverified rumors, and opinion pieces are excluded.
Every Saturday: a weekly recap of the five trends that defined the week.
Hosted by David Perron.
